reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del playero Gustavo a las 21:20 hs y destacó la limpieza de los baños , realmente una muy buena experiencia

Excellent service from the beach attendant Gustavo at 9:20 pm, and I especially appreciated the cleanliness of the restrooms; truly a very good experience.

reviews.comment:
Acabamos de pedir un sandwich de milanesa con jamón y queso para llevar y comer en la ruta. Estaba exquisito y abundante  10/10. Y nos lo dieron cortado por la mitad. Gracias excelente servicio!

(Translated by Google)
We just ordered a breaded steak sandwich with ham and cheese to take away and eat on the road. It was delicious and a generous portion, 10/10. And they gave it to us cut in half. Thanks, excellent service!

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Lucía por tu comentario, te esperemos nuevamente
